emails.welcome_body: Thanks for signing up! You're all set to start managing your social media.
emails.verify_body: Click the button below to verify your email and get started.
emails.reset_body: Click the button below to reset your password. This link expires in 1 hour.
emails.invite_body: {inviter} has invited you to join their workspace on {app_name}.
emails.post_failed_body: Your post to {platform} failed to publish. Reason: {reason}
emails.report_ready_body: Your {report_type} report for {period} is ready to download.
emails.approval_body: {author} has submitted a post for your review.
emails.token_expired_body: Your {platform} connection has expired. Reconnect to continue publishing.
